'''chapozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loadstone|loadstone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loadstone|loadstone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chapozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæpezheth|chæpezheth]] || [[word:chæpezhej|chæpezhej]] || [[word:chæpezhesh|chæpezhesh]] || [[word:chæpezhe|chæpezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chapopozhoth|chapopozhoth]] || [[word:chapopozhoj|chapopozhoj]] || [[word:chapopozhosh|chapopozhosh]] || [[word:chapopozho|chapopozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chapozhoth|chapozhoth]] || [[word:chapozhoj|chapozhoj]] || [[word:chapozhosh|chapozhosh]] || [[word:chapozho|chapozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chapofzhoth|chapofzhoth]] || [[word:chapofzhoj|chapofzhoj]] || [[word:chapofzhosh|chapofzhosh]] || [[word:chapofzhof|chapofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chapozhotho|chapozhotho]] || [[word:chapozhojo|chapozhojo]] || [[word:chapozhosho|chapozhosho]] || [[word:chapozhoko|chapozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chapozhoth|chapozhoth]] || [[word:chapozhoj|chapozhoj]] || [[word:chapozhosh|chapozhosh]] || [[word:chapozho|chapozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chapozhothol|chapozhothol]] || [[word:chapozhojol|chapozhojol]] || [[word:chapozhoshol|chapozhoshol]] || [[word:chapozhokol|chapozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chapozhothotho|chapozhothotho]] || [[word:chapozhojojo|chapozhojojo]] || [[word:chapozhoshosho|chapozhoshosho]] || [[word:chapozhoko|chapozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chapozhothon|chapozhothon]] || [[word:chapozhojon|chapozhojon]] || [[word:chapozhoshon|chapozhoshon]] || [[word:chapozhokon|chapozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chapozhothoro|chapozhothoro]] || [[word:chapozhojoro|chapozhojoro]] || [[word:chapozhoshoro|chapozhoshoro]] || [[word:chapozhokoro|chapozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
